description: NB: This is not the correct shelfmark. Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic. "Obtained [i.e., sums cashed from tenants] during the [Muslim] month Dhū l-Qaʿda corresponding to Nisan 1554 [Seleucid; both months began on March 24, 1243]." Only thirteen names preserved, ten of which are identical with A 95, dated 1247 CE. The only sum preserved (5, in Coptic) is also identical with that paid by the relevant tenant four years later. (Information from Med Soc II, App. A, #154.)
description_he: חשבונות ביהודית-ערבית; סכומים שנגבו מדיירים בחודש ד'ו אל-קעדה = ניסן 1554 שטרות = מרץ 1243 לספירה
